orientation.what: A coaching practice OS that automates Steve Jacobs' manual executive coaching workflow into a multi-tenant conversational platform where coaches configure their own AI-powered practice and clients receive hyper-personalized learning briefings on any professional topic.
orientation.done: Steve can configure his AI assistant's identity and skills via admin UI, Marcus can request and receive a hyper-personalized briefing + podcast within 48 hours, and the briefing demonstrably reflects his role, industry, and stated context.
